title: Build a SpiderIQ Personalized Landing Page
summary: Build a personalized landing page via /lp/{slug}/{place_id} with merge tags fed by IDAP. Walks through dynamic_landing template, merge-tag vocabulary ({{ lead.name }}, {{ lead.city }}), resolve_lead lookup, and end-to-end deploy. Use for 'a personalized outreach page', 'a /lp/ page', 'one page per business', 'cold-outreach landing'.
